cards.title: Jensen Huang Predicts $200B AI Agent CPU Market
cards.body: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang forecasts a massive new market for AI agent CPUs worth $200 billion. This represents the next major growth opportunity for the chip giant beyond current AI infrastructure.

cards.title: Anthropic Eyes First Profitable Quarter
cards.body: Anthropic told investors it will more than double revenue to $10.9 billion in Q2 2026. The company is on track to reach profitability as AI demand accelerates.

cards.title: xAI Lost $6.4B in 2025, Plans Expansion
cards.body: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals Elon Musk's xAI burned through $6.4 billion last year while planning massive Grok expansion. The filing offers the first public glimpse at xAI's financial performance and AI ambitions.

cards.title: Nvidia Posts Record Quarter, Holds $43B Startup Stakes
cards.body: Nvidia announced record revenues but forecasted slower growth for the next quarter. The company revealed $43 billion in holdings across AI startups.

cards.title: xAI Buying $2.8B in Natural Gas Turbines
cards.body: xAI plans to purchase $2.8 billion worth of natural gas turbines over three years to power AI infrastructure. The massive energy investment highlights the computational demands of training advanced AI models.

cards.title: Anthropic Pays xAI $1.25B Monthly for Compute
cards.body: Elon Musk's xAI struck a major deal to sell computing power to Anthropic. The arrangement is worth $1.25 billion per month.

cards.title: OpenAI Claims Breakthrough on 80-Year Math Problem
cards.body: OpenAI's reasoning model reportedly disproved a geometry conjecture unsolved since 1946. Mathematicians who previously caught OpenAI overstating claims are backing this achievement.

cards.title: Andrew Ng-Backed IrisGo Launches AI Desktop Assistant
cards.body: IrisGo, an AI startup backed by Andrew Ng, watches desktop activity and learns to automate user tasks. The 'AI butler' learns from observation without explicit programming.

cards.title: OpenAI Prepares IPO Reportedly Slated for September
cards.body: Following Elon Musk's failed lawsuit, OpenAI is back on track for its IPO. The company could go public as soon as September 2026.

cards.title: AI Search Startups Experiencing Rapid Growth
cards.body: AI search has become one of the most attractive targets for consumer AI investment. Multiple startups are competing in this emerging category.

cards.title: Stability AI Releases Audio 3.0 with 6-Minute Songs
cards.body: Stability Audio 3.0 can run on-device and generate two-minute tracks. The model represents a significant improvement in AI-generated music capabilities.

cards.title: NanoClaw Raises $12M Seed, Rejects $20M Acquisition
cards.body: NanoClaw, created as a secure alternative for AI agent marketing work, raised $12 million instead of accepting a $20 million buyout. The platform runs AI agents sandboxed in containers for security.

cards.title: Figma Launches AI Assistant for Design Automation
cards.body: Figma's new AI agent allows users to generate, edit, and iterate designs using natural language prompts. The tool automates common design tasks across the collaborative platform.

cards.title: Google Expands Gmail with AI Voice Search
cards.body: Google's Gmail now features conversational voice search powered by Gemini AI. Users can ask the AI assistant to find buried email details using natural speech.

cards.title: Google Launches Agentic Information Monitors
cards.body: Google is rolling out AI-powered 'information agents' that monitor topics and proactively alert users to updates. The agents go beyond traditional search to provide contextual information.

cards.title: Ocean Raises $28M for AI Email Security Platform
cards.body: Ocean, an agentic email security startup, claims its AI analyzes context to detect fraud and impersonation attempts. The platform raised $28 million from investors concerned about AI phishing.

cards.title: Elon Musk Loses Lawsuit Against OpenAI
cards.body: A jury rejected Elon Musk's lawsuit claiming Sam Altman 'stole' OpenAI's non-profit structure. The verdict confirmed Musk's case was weak, partly due to delays in filing.

cards.title: OpenAI's Reasoning Model Validates Geometry Proof
cards.body: OpenAI's o1 reasoning model successfully solved a 1946 geometry conjecture. Leading mathematicians have verified the AI's mathematical breakthrough.

cards.title: Google I/O Positions Search Toward Agentic AI
cards.body: Google announced plans to remake search with agentic AI capabilities in 2026. The shift represents a major transformation in how users will interact with search.

cards.title: China Bans RTX 5090D V2 During Huang Visit
cards.body: China prohibited Nvidia's RTX 5090D V2 GPU while CEO Jensen Huang was visiting the country. The move reflects ongoing tensions over AI chip export restrictions.
